description: Extend hex chat to inject brain context (queue, validate, recent commits) per message, stream brain_tick events inline, persist conversation history, and support --resume.

phases.name: Brain context bundle injector
phases.description: Function that gathers daemon status + queue + validate summary + last 3 git commits into a ~500-token context block prepended to each chat message.

tasks.name: Implement build_brain_context() in chat.rs
tasks.description: New async fn build_brain_context() -> String in hex-cli/src/commands/chat.rs. Calls hex brain daemon-status, hex brain queue list (count only), hex brain validate (summary), git log -3. Formats as [brain context]\n...\n[end context] block. Token-cap at 500 chars.

tasks.name: Inject context into chat message
tasks.description: In the chat send handler: prepend build_brain_context() output to system prompt OR as a hidden context turn. User input stays unchanged. Ensures LLM always sees current state without user restating.

phases.name: Status intent detection + conversational reply
phases.description: When chat message matches 'status', 'what are you doing', 'how's it going', generate conversational response using brain context (not raw command output).

tasks.name: Pre-prompt LLM for conversational tone on status queries
tasks.description: Detect status-intent phrases in chat input. When matched, prepend to system prompt: 'Respond conversationally, first-person, acknowledging the operator. Use the brain context to give a natural status update — not a data dump.' Applies only to the single turn.

phases.name: brain_tick event stream integration
phases.description: hex chat --with-daemon subscribes to brain_tick events. Inline-injects 'just finished X' messages during conversation.

tasks.name: Add --with-daemon flag + tokio task for brain_tick polling
tasks.description: In chat.rs: add --with-daemon flag. When set, spawn tokio task that polls /api/events?type=brain_tick every 5s since chat started. Each new event renders as dimmed line '↪ {timestamp} brain: {summary}' above the next prompt. Non-blocking.

phases.name: Chat session persistence + resume
phases.description: Save conversation history to HexFlo memory. hex chat --resume continues prior session.

tasks.name: Persist chat messages to HexFlo memory
tasks.description: Each user+assistant turn POSTed to /api/hexflo/memory with key chat-session:{session_id}:{turn_number}, value {role, content, timestamp}. Session ID is UUID generated on chat start.

tasks.name: hex chat --resume <session-id>
tasks.description: New flag. Searches HexFlo memory for chat-session:<id>:*, loads all turns in order, replays as context into new session, continues conversation from there.
